page_metadata.biotools__summary: A command-line interface (CLI) based program that allows quickly batched requests for obtaining MLST profiles on multiple FASTA sequences and exporting it as a convenient CSV. Capable of querying a variety of MLST databases from both Institut Pasteur and PubMLST.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: Automated MLST typing from PubMLST and InstitutPasteur.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: A command-line interface (CLI) based program that allows quickly batched requests for obtaining MLST profiles on multiple FASTA sequences and exporting it as a convenient CSV. Capable of querying a variety of MLST databases from both Institut Pasteur and PubMLST.
